description: CompositionCharcoal V-neck sweater made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neck with a second yellow neckline inside, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, ribbed hem and embroidered brand logo on the left chestFitRegularWash careHand wash separately using a mild detergentDo not bleach, wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild iron; Do not iron on decorationsEnjoy the chill in this stylish sweater from wrangler. The ribbed V-neck and long sleeves makes this sweater a must have, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you feeling warm and comfortable all day long. Layer this over shirts or tees, jeans and leather slip-ons for a laid back look.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
